# Outputs

This folder contains figures generated by the analysis pipelines in this repository. All figures were produced using the example species notebooks (`example_interaction_species.ipynb` and `example_wind_species.ipynb`).

---

## Interaction Analysis Figures
*Generated by `example_interaction_species.ipynb` — Part 15*

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `fig1_wind_nonlinear.png` | Predicted abundance vs. continuous wind variable (nonlinear GAM smooth) |
| `fig2_wind_categorical.png` | Predicted abundance by wind turbine category (boxplot) |
| `fig3_crp_only.png` | Predicted abundance vs. CRP variable (GAM smooth) |
| `fig4_additive_categorical.png` | Additive model — categorical wind × continuous CRP |
| `fig5_additive_nonlinear.png` | Additive model — continuous wind × continuous CRP |
| `fig6_interaction_categorical.png` | Interaction model — categorical wind × continuous CRP |
| `fig7_interaction_heatmap.png` | Interaction model — continuous wind × CRP (2D heatmap) |

---

## Wind-Only Analysis Figures
*Generated by `example_wind_species.ipynb` — Part 11*

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `fig_wind_continuous.png` | Predicted abundance vs. continuous wind variable (GAM smooth) |
| `fig_wind_categorical.png` | Predicted abundance by wind turbine category (boxplot) |

---

## Notes

- Figures are produced on the held-out test set (20% split) using `predict.gam()` with `type = "response"`
- Continuous predictors on x-axes are back-transformed from z-score standardization using scaling parameters saved during Part 6 of each pipeline
- Species-specific results will differ from those reported in the manuscripts, which represent the best-supported model for each of 27 grassland-obligate species across their full breeding ranges

---
